'''koshataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:iatroleptic|iatroleptic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-sh-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iatroleptic|iatroleptic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| koshataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:koshatithi|koshatithi]] || [[word:koshatiji|koshatiji]] || [[word:koshatishi|koshatishi]] || [[word:koshatiki|koshatiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:koshatuthuthu|koshatuthuthu]] || [[word:koshatujuju|koshatujuju]] || [[word:koshatushushu|koshatushushu]] || [[word:koshatukuku|koshatukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:koshatuthu|koshatuthu]] || [[word:koshatuju|koshatuju]] || [[word:koshatushu|koshatushu]] || [[word:koshatuku|koshatuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:koshatufthuf|koshatufthuf]] || [[word:koshatufjuf|koshatufjuf]] || [[word:koshatufshuf|koshatufshuf]] || [[word:koshatufkuf|koshatufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:koshatethe|koshatethe]] || [[word:koshateje|koshateje]] || [[word:koshateshe|koshateshe]] || [[word:koshateke|koshateke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:koshatothotho|koshatothotho]] || [[word:koshatojojo|koshatojojo]] || [[word:koshatoshosho|koshatoshosho]] || [[word:koshatokoko|koshatokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:koshatotho|koshatotho]] || [[word:koshatojo|koshatojo]] || [[word:koshatosho|koshatosho]] || [[word:koshatoko|koshatoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:koshatofthof|koshatofthof]] || [[word:koshatofjof|koshatofjof]] || [[word:koshatofshof|koshatofshof]] || [[word:koshatofkof|koshatofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:koshatïfthïf|koshatïfthïf]] || [[word:koshatïfjïf|koshatïfjïf]] || [[word:koshatïfshïf|koshatïfshïf]] || [[word:koshatïfkïf|koshatïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:koshatïfthïfthïf|koshatïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:koshatïfjïfjïf|koshatïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:koshatïfshïfshïf|koshatïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:koshatïfkïfkïf|koshatïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:koshatïfthïf|koshatïfthïf]] || [[word:koshatïfjïf|koshatïfjïf]] || [[word:koshatïfshïf|koshatïfshïf]] || [[word:koshatïfkïf|koshatïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:koshatïfthïf|koshatïfthïf]] || [[word:koshatïfjïf|koshatïfjïf]] || [[word:koshatïfshïf|koshatïfshïf]] || [[word:koshatïfkïf|koshatïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:koshatæthæ|koshatæthæ]] || [[word:koshatæjæ|koshatæjæ]] || [[word:koshatæshæ|koshatæshæ]] || [[word:koshatækæ|koshatækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:koshatathatha|koshatathatha]] || [[word:koshatajaja|koshatajaja]] || [[word:koshatashasha|koshatashasha]] || [[word:koshatakaka|koshatakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:koshatatha|koshatatha]] || [[word:koshataja|koshataja]] || [[word:koshatasha|koshatasha]] || [[word:koshataka|koshataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:koshatafthaf|koshatafthaf]] || [[word:koshatafjaf|koshatafjaf]] || [[word:koshatafshaf|koshatafshaf]] || [[word:koshatafkaf|koshatafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:koshatasha|koshatasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:koshatshësha|koshatshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:koshatrosha|koshatrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:koshatmusha|koshatmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:koshatyasha|koshatyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokoshatnkshësha|gokoshatnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokoshatnkrosha|gokoshatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokoshatnkmusha|gokoshatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokoshatnkyasha|gokoshatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:koshashatasha|koshashatasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:koshashatshësha|koshashatshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:koshashatrosha|koshashatrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:koshashatmusha|koshashatmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:koshashatyasha|koshashatyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokoshashatnkshësha|gokoshashatnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokoshashatnkrosha|gokoshashatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokoshashatnkmusha|gokoshashatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokoshashatnkyasha|gokoshashatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:keshætasha|keshætasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:keshætshësha|keshætshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:keshætrosha|keshætrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:keshætmusha|keshætmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:keshætyasha|keshætyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokeshætnkshësha|gokeshætnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokeshætnkrosha|gokeshætnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokeshætnkmusha|gokeshætnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokeshætnkyasha|gokeshætnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:koshfatasha|koshfatasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:koshfatshësha|koshfatshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:koshfatrosha|koshfatrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:koshfatmusha|koshfatmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:koshfatyasha|koshfatyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokoshfatnkshësha|gokoshfatnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokoshfatnkrosha|gokoshfatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokoshfatnkmusha|gokoshfatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokoshfatnkyasha|gokoshfatnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
